articles.title: Measuring Less to Learn More: Quadratic Speedup in Learning Nonlinear Properties of Quantum States
articles.title_zh: 测量更少，了解更多：学习量子态非线性特性的二次加速
articles.abstract: Author(s): Yukun Zhang, Yusen Wu, You Zhou, and Xiao Yuan A fundamental task in quantum information science is to measure nonlinear functionals of quantum states, such as Tr(ρkO). Intuitively, one expects that computing a kth order quantity generally requires O(k) copies of the state ρ, and we rigorously establish this lower… [Phys. Rev. Lett. 136, 130602] Published Fri Apr 03, 2026
articles.abstract_zh: 作者：张玉坤、吴玉森、周游、袁晓 量子信息科学的一个基本任务是测量量子态的非线性泛函，例如 Tr(ρkO)。直观上，人们预计计算第 k 个阶量通常需要 O(k) 状态 ρ 的副本，并且我们严格地建立了这个较低的...... [Phys.莱特牧师。 136, 130602] 发布于 2026 年 4 月 3 日星期五
authors: Yukun Zhang, Yusen Wu, You Zhou, and Xiao Yuan

articles.title: Evidence for odd-parity superconductivity underpinned by antiferromagnetism in heavy-fermion metal YbRh 2 Si 2
articles.title_zh: 重费米子金属 YbRh 2 Si 2 反铁磁性支撑奇宇称超导性的证据
articles.abstract: Nature Physics, Published online: 03 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41567-026-03247-x Odd-parity spin-triplet superconductivity remains difficult to establish experimentally. Now, several distinct magnetic-field-tuned superconducting states—including a possible topological helical phase—have been identified in YbRh2Si2.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然物理学》，在线发布：2026 年 4 月 3 日； doi:10.1038/s41567-026-03247-x 奇宇称自旋三重态超导性仍然难以通过实验建立。现在，已经在 YbRh2Si2 中发现了几种不同的磁场调谐超导态，包括可能的拓扑螺旋相。
